title: Requisite Needs Indoor Broom Soft Bristle Sweeping Brush - Perfect Kitchen Broom for Laminate, Vinyl, Wooden Floor, living room or bathroom
features: Detachable Broom Set - 5 Pcs. floor brush set comes with long detachable handle to ensure you pure comfort while cleaning and you can customize it on your own as per the length you may need.

Strong and sturdy construction: The requisite needs floor mop is made of premium materials and has strong building quality which will provide you a service for a long time without getting damaged or unusable.

Perfect Cleaning: The bristle of this amazing floor brush are very flexible and super quality that will make sure to wipe the floor leaving no dust or any particle behind. Get the absolute perfect cleaning in minimum effort. It saves you a lot of time and effort while cleaning.

Easy to store: The floor broom has detachable handle that not only allows you to customize it as per your need. But also gives you an amazing option to store it in very few space. Hence its space saving and you can store it anywhere in your home.

Convenient and Ideal: The indoor floor broom brush has its own specification that will help you make the cleaning of your house a child's play. It is very easy to use, gives you the customization option and sweeps very smoothly leaving your floor absolutely clean.
